title: Open links from Monday email notifications in app (not browser)
excerpt: My team primarily uses our desktop app for Monday.com rather than the browser version. Right now, when we receive email notifications from Monday and click on “Reply in Monday.com”, it opens it as a new browser tab rathe…

posts.author: Ophirm93 (Ophir Moshkovitz)
posts.cookedHtml:
My team primarily uses our desktop app for Monday.com rather than the browser version. Right now, when we receive email notifications from Monday and click on “Reply in Monday.com”, it opens it as a new browser tab rather than opening the discussion in my already-open system application, which is frustrating.

I have so many tabs open on my internet browser already and I don’t want Monday to add to them, we have the system application installed for a reason.

posts.author: Vinny (Vinny C)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have the same issue and its driving me mad. have you found a solve?
on mobile it recognizes the app and opens there but on a Mac desktop/laptop it still goes to the browser.

posts.author: chadgarber (Chad Garber)
posts.cookedHtml: Same problem here. I don’t use web. I use native apps.

posts.author: RKTBP (Rebecca)
posts.cookedHtml: Same issue! Surely Monday have a fix for this.

posts.author: RunningRepairs (Running Repairs)
posts.cookedHtml: This please Monday.com

posts.author: asecondloginisinsane (E O-H)
posts.cookedHtml: same annoyance/issue. monday competitors allow this basic functionality. please do this simple thing asap for user adoption.

posts.author: GeoffVV (Geoff Sharp)
posts.cookedHtml: OK Monday team this one small issue is causing deep frustration amongst my team - at least explain why it can’t happen (after all it might be a Microsoft mail thing) or fix this? you have issues /feature requests on this dating back to 2019.

posts.author: JillianAD (Jillian)
posts.cookedHtml: Please fix this! What’s the point of email notifications if they won’t open in the app?
